title: Basically Implosion
description: Adds a sword that has the implosion scroll from Hypixel Skyblock
body:
# How this mod works?
When you right click a mob or entity, it kill all of the mobs in like a 5 block radius, **but your weapon takes the amount of damage the amount of mobs you kill**


# Why should i use this?
I mean, doesnt it sound cool to have a weapon that one-shots players?

# Isnt this too op?
No, not really.
You need 9 netherite blocks total to make this weapon, so its not that op, you really have to grind for it

# Notes:
This was made in **MCreator**
This mod isnt the best
